text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet and I are heading back after a day
out, when all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Rain?! You've got to be kidding me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We hurriedly duck under a nearby tree.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, seriously?! I know it's been cloudy today,
but the forecast said it was going to stay dry!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The academy is still a ways away... I wonder when
this'll let up.
choice_data_list: Should we try to sprint home?
Should we try to sprint home?
Let's just stay here until the rain stops.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Y-you're joking, right?! I might be fine, but you...
choice_data_list: Last one there's a rotten egg!
Last one there's a rotten egg!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for the love of... Don't come crying to me
when you catch a cold!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You know, it's actually kind of magical, isn't it?
Running together in the rain like this!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, this is really getting fun!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Look sharp back there! If you don't hurry up, I'll
leave you behind!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We run all the way back to the academy. Daiwa
Scarlet seems pretty happy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I can't afford to catch a cold. I hope
it lets up soon...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Still, it'd be boring to just wait here doing
nothing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I know! This is the perfect chance for you to tell
me about yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Luckily for you, I don't have anything else to do,
so I might as well listen. Hehe, guess this rain was
a blessing in disguise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Daiwa Scarlet all about myself while we
shelter under the tree.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She listens with rapt attention until the rain
subsides.
